title: Villager Cartographer House
description: Adds a Villager Cartographer House to the plains biome
body:
### Villager Cartographer House

**This mod adds a Villager Cartographer House to the game, featuring Cartographer villagers who live and work inside the new structure.**

![House](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/32698d65d18152fbcea7a71a3b10e88a5d107332.jpeg)

You’ll find maps, paper, and other cartography-themed loot throughout the house.

![Inside](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e3035559c21dcd083d08e9f00862d8b765ea5c99.jpeg)

The Villager Cartographer House can spawn in the Plains and Sunflower Plains biomes.

Feel free to use this mod in your modpack
